title: phleum pratense subsp. trabutii
intro: Phleum pratense subsp. trabutii, also known as a subspecies of timothy grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Phleum pratense subsp. trabutii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of allergies.
